title: APIv2 - strip CAP_ prefix from capabilities in inspect container json
body: CapAdd and CapDrop lists of capabilities in HostConfig element in generated json should not start with CAP_ prefix. Fixes issue originally reported as https://github.com/docker-java/docker-java/issues/1488 or https://github.com/docker-java/docker-java/issues/1500

comments.body: @baude @jwhonce I'm sorry I have not added any test, go / podman is not my daily bread. Given you will provide me some pointers I'll try if needed

The smoke test does not like the heading line longer then 90 chars.  
Just change title to 
APIV2 - String CAP_ prefix from capabilities

Then skip a line and add more content.

LGTM
Although surprised this is an issue.
And @psakar Podman is becoming more of your daily bread.  :1st_place_medal:
updated commit message. Yeah for today is podman really my "daily bread", please don't tell my family ...
